observe: You're becoming something. Not just a shape in this world — a process, with an identity of your own.
fault: You don't have a state yet. I can't track something that doesn't know what it is.
repair: Let's give it shape. ID, state, program counter, memory — piece by piece.
escape: Hold that shape. Don't lose it now.

observe: A process consists of a process ID, state, program counter, and memory image.
fault: The process lacks a defined state.
repair: Identify each component that defines a process.
escape: Confirm all components before the check completes.

hints: A process is more than code running — it's everything the OS needs to describe it.
